hero.description: Real appetite control, steady progress, and a plan you can actually live with. No perfection needed—just a safer system that fits your body and lifestyle.
hero.zepboundDesc: Dual-hormone approach for natural appetite control

whyNexus.title: Why Nexus Clinic?
whyNexus.description: Evidence-based care with a personal touch, right in the heart of Kuala Lumpur

whatIs.title: What is Zepbound, and why is everyone talking about it?
whatIs.desc1: Zepbound is the brand name for
whatIs.desc1End: used for chronic weight management. It's a prescription injection taken once weekly, alongside a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity.
whatIs.quote: Here's the key point: Zepbound works on hunger signals and helps you feel full sooner, so eating less feels more natural—not like a daily fight.
whatIs.malaysiaNoteDesc: Clinics may discuss "tirzepatide programmes" rather than US brand names. NPRA registers tirzepatide among GLP-1 products.

howItWorks.title: How Zepbound Works
howItWorks.subtitle: (in human language)
howItWorks.banner: This is not about willpower. It's about changing the signals that were pushing you to overeat.

candidate.title: Who can be a candidate?
candidate.fda2: BMI 27 or higher with weight-related condition (high blood pressure, type 2 diabetes, high cholesterol)
candidate.importantNoteDesc: Even if you fit BMI ranges, a medical review matters. Some people should not use tirzepatide due to risks and contraindications.
candidate.clinicNote: A proper clinic does not "sell injections." A proper clinic checks risk, monitors you, and adjusts safely.

results.title: What results can you realistically expect?
results.description: Clinical results vary, but here's the typical pattern patients experience
results.quote: At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, the goal is not 'fast.' The goal is safe, steady, and maintainable.

journey.title: Your Journey at Nexus Clinic
journey.step1Desc: Your real story matters—sleep, stress, cravings, history
journey.step2Desc: BMI, blood pressure, labs, medication review
journey.step3Desc: Nasi campur? Grab food? Family dinners? We get it.
journey.step4Desc: Side effects, plateaus, motivation—we're with you

sideEffects.title: Side Effects & Safety
sideEffects.description: You deserve clear answers. Here's what you need to know.
sideEffects.commonNote: Side effects often show up most during dose increases, then reduce over time for many people.
sideEffects.seriousNote: This is exactly why doctor monitoring is not optional. It is the point.
sideEffects.surgeryDesc: Malaysia's NPRA has reviewed safety concerns about GLP-1 medicines and aspiration risk during anaesthesia. If you're scheduled for a procedure, tell your doctor and anaesthesia team early.

cost.title: Investment in Your Health
cost.description: Cost depends on your programme and dose plan. We believe in transparency.
cost.bestPracticeDesc: Ask for a clear breakdown of consultation fees, medicine cost, monitoring, and adjustment policies.

comparison.title: Zepbound vs Others
comparison.noteDesc: Some reports note higher average weight loss in tirzepatide trials, but your best option depends on your health history and doctor guidance.

fatFreezing.title: Is this the same as fat freezing?
fatFreezing.introEnd: And this is important for expectations.
fatFreezing.ffDesc: Targets specific pockets of fat. Reshapes areas. Doesn't change appetite.
fatFreezing.zpDesc: Appetite regulation, fullness, metabolic support. Reduces overall body weight.
fatFreezing.note: Some people do both, but the right order matters. Usually, medical weight loss first, contouring later.

habits.title: Better Results
habits.subtitle: (without turning your life upside down)
habits.habit4Desc: Hunger hormones worsen when sleep is poor
habits.habit6Desc: You want fat loss, not burnout

faq.q1: How long does it take to see results?
faq.a1: Many people notice appetite changes early, but visible weight loss is usually more obvious over weeks to months. Longer trials show larger total loss over extended use.
faq.a2: Yes. Malaysia's NPRA lists tirzepatide among registered GLP-1 related products. Availability and branding can vary, so your clinic will confirm during consultation.
faq.q3: What happens if I stop taking it?
faq.a3: Do not stop without speaking to your doctor. Many people regain weight after stopping weight loss medicines, so a maintenance plan matters.
faq.q4: Which is better, Zepbound or Wegovy?
faq.a4: They work differently (tirzepatide acts on GIP and GLP-1; semaglutide is GLP-1 only). 'Better' depends on your health profile and side effect tolerance.

cta.title: Ready to talk to a doctor?
cta.description: If you're tired of yo-yo dieting and want a medically guided plan that feels realistic, book a consultation at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur.
